get.summary: ListConfigAudit returns the dashboard/group configuration change history.
ListDashboards returns paginated dashboards for admin.

post.summary: CreateDashboard creates a new dashboard definition.

get.summary: ListAccessibleDashboards returns dashboards visible to the calling user (for viewer sidebar).
GetDashboardByCode returns a dashboard by its business code.
GetDashboardData resolves dashboard config + filters and returns chart-ready data.
GetDashboard returns a dashboard by ID.

post.summary: DuplicateDashboard clones a dashboard with a new code/title.

put.summary: SetDashboardRoles overwrites the dashboard's role whitelist.

get.summary: GetFactDistincts returns distinct type/group_1/group_2/group_3 values for an optional type filter.

post.summary: CreateDashboardGroup creates a new dashboard group.

get.summary: ListJobs returns ETL job registry entries.
ListJobLogs returns logs for a specific job.

post.summary: TriggerJob manually triggers an ETL job run.
PreviewDashboard renders an unsaved dashboard config against real fact data (admin only).

get.summary: ListUploads returns paginated upload session history.

post.summary: ParseUpload parses an uploaded .xlsx, validates rows, writes to staging, returns a preview.

get.summary: DownloadUploadTemplate returns a blank .xlsx template matching the FACT_METRIC shape.

post.summary: CancelUpload discards a previewed session without committing.
CommitUpload UPSERTs the staged rows of a previewed session into fact_metric.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated (ISO 8601).

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.
